original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Michael, Daniel, Evelyn, and Joseph. Michael said that Evelyn is a knight. Daniel told you that Joseph is a knave or Michael is a knight. Evelyn commented, "Daniel is a knight or Joseph is a knave". Joseph remarked, "If Joseph is a knight then Daniel is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
